HGSS.055.0000:
So many people have gone up
the tower with a Rainbow Wing\r
to try and bring back HO-OH.\f
But none succeeded in making
HO-OH appear...\f
The Rainbow Wing is merely to permit you
to go up this tower.\f
What HO-OH has longed for is the
invisible trust between people and\r
Pokémon...\f
Or the person who can restore such
a relationship...\f
HGSS.055.0001:
A long time ago, there used to be a
Pokémon at the top of this tower,\r
namely HO-OH.\f
But it flew away, and no one has seen it
since...\f
If anyone who could restore deep trust
between people and Pokémon were to\r
come here with something linked to\r
HO-OH... It may come down for such\r
a person...\f
HGSS.055.0003:
You have done it...
Please come through.
HGSS.055.0004:
That Rainbow Wing will merely permit you
to go up the tower.\f
If you are not the kind of person who
would restore the trust between people\r
and Pokémon, HO-OH will never show\r
itself to you...
HGSS.055.0005:
Hmmm.\f
So it was you and the Bell!
HGSS.055.0006:
You are quite a remarkable Trainer
for your age...
HGSS.055.0007:
Morty: Bell Tower is where
people and Pokémon test their trust.\f
You may be born with some talent...\r
Can we exchange numbers?\f
I would love to examine the trust
you have with your Pokémon. [0200,0000]
HGSS.055.0009:
Morty: Give me a call on Tuesday nights.
I should be free and ready.
HGSS.055.0010:
Morty: I really wanted to see the
trust you have with your Pokémon...
HGSS.055.0011:
Morty: Do you want to exchange
numbers? [0200,0000]
